title: Can I view General Caster and App Integration usage?

posts.author: antonygarnett (Antony)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to view all my Apps integrations in 1 place. ? I am receiving notifications from General Caster to say that I have hit the limit on my automations but I’m not sure which board has these integration. Our Monday setup is quite large and so I was wondering if there was a way to View all my App usage and see which Boards use which Apps?

Many thanks,
Antony
